history.qwen_observation: Compilation failed because the org.apache.commons.fileupload package is missing after the Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade, likely due to dependency management changes dropping the commons-fileupload dependency.
history.qwen_rationale: Insert a pom_patch step before the Spring Boot upgrade to explicitly add commons-fileupload:commons-fileupload:1.5 to the project dependencies, ensuring the package is available on the compile classpath during and after the framework migration.

history.qwen_observation: The Spring Boot 3 upgrade step fails to compile because commons-fileupload is missing from the classpath, likely due to transitive dependency changes during the upgrade.
history.qwen_rationale: Replacing the pom_patch with an OpenRewrite AddDependency recipe ensures the dependency is correctly inserted into the POM before the Spring Boot upgrade runs. This should resolve the compilation error caused by the missing org.apache.commons.fileupload package.

history.qwen_observation: Compilation fails with 'package org.apache.commons.fileupload does not exist' during the Spring Boot 3 upgrade step, likely because the dependency was not correctly persisted or was overridden by the parent POM change.
history.qwen_rationale: Using a pom_patch step to directly inject the commons-fileupload dependency ensures it is present in the POM before the heavy Spring Boot 3 upgrade recipe runs, avoiding any recipe interference or scope issues. The rest of the chain follows the standard JDK 17 to 21 migration path.

history.qwen_observation: Compilation fails because commons-fileupload:1.5 relies on javax.servlet, which is incompatible with Spring Boot 3's Jakarta EE 10 stack.
history.qwen_rationale: Replacing the legacy dependency with commons-fileupload2-jakarta-servlet6:2.0.0 ensures the org.apache.commons.fileupload package is available on the compile classpath under the Jakarta namespace required by Spring Boot 3.

history.qwen_observation: The build failed because the artifact commons-fileupload:commons-fileupload2-jakarta-servlet6:2.0.0 could not be resolved in the local Nexus repository, and prior attempts to inject commons-fileupload dependencies were either stripped by the Spring Boot 3 upgrade recipe or used incorrect artifact coordinates.
history.qwen_rationale: Adding the standard javax-based commons-fileupload:commons-fileupload:1.5 via a pom_patch step before the Spring Boot 3 upgrade ensures the code compiles initially. The UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 recipe will then handle the javax-to-jakarta migration and dependency updates. Starting with the widely available 1.5 version avoids Nexus resolution failures while allowing the meta-recipe to manage the Jakarta transition.
